name: Fleet Systems Update Process
description: Update TPMS, AMS, and Holman systems for vehicle transition

steps.title: Update TPMS (Truck Parts Management System)
steps.description: Update parts management system with new vehicle information

substeps.title: Remove old vehicle from TPMS
substeps.description: Remove previous truck from parts management system

substeps.title: Add new BYOV to TPMS
substeps.description: Enter new BYOV vehicle into parts management system

substeps.title: Verify TPMS update completed
substeps.description: Confirm changes are properly reflected in TPMS

substeps.title: Update asset management records
substeps.description: Modify asset tracking for vehicle transition

substeps.title: Transfer equipment assignments
substeps.description: Move equipment assignments from old to new vehicle

substeps.title: Verify AMS update completed
substeps.description: Confirm changes are properly reflected in AMS

substeps.title: Update Holman fleet records
substeps.description: Modify fleet tracking in Holman system

substeps.title: Sync vehicle data across systems
substeps.description: Ensure all systems have consistent vehicle information

substeps.title: Verify Holman update completed
substeps.description: Confirm changes are properly reflected in Holman system
